panel.streamPreviewPlaceholder: The preview will be available here after the transmission is started.
panel.audioEnabledDesc: This option decides whether your stream will have audio.
panel.audioFromPcDesc: Share computer audio along with external audio device.
panel.audioFromDeviceDesc: Select a microphone, whose audio to include in the stream.
panel.audioFromDeviceNoPermissionsErrorDesc: Your browser does not support this function or you denied access to audio devices.
panel.limitedFunctionality: Camera and microphone access denied. Limited to screen sharing only.
